Sun.role: Core life force, essence, vitality, and main self-expression.

Earth.role: Grounding, stability, and balance; how Sun energy becomes practical.

Moon.role: Inner drive and emotional motivation; what pulls the person into movement.

Mercury.role: Thinking, speech, and communication; how ideas are shared.

Venus.role: Values, relationships, money patterns, and what matters most.

Mars.role: Raw energy, impulses, mistakes, and growth through experience.

Jupiter.role: Expansion, prosperity, opportunity, and guiding principles.

Saturn.role: Lessons, discipline, limits, maturity, and responsibility.

Uranus.role: Originality, disruption, uniqueness, and unconventional expression.

Neptune.role: Mystery, dreams, spiritual sensitivity, and subtle perception.

Pluto.role: Transformation, power, depth, and unconscious evolution.

North Node.role: Future direction, growth path, and environment that pulls forward.

South Node.role: Past patterns, familiar comfort zone, and previous orientation.
